====[[Pokémon Ruby & Sapphire (CoroCoro Comic)]]====
[[File:Sapphire Suigun.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Sapphire in Pokémon Ruby & Sapphire CoroCoro]]
Another counterpart of May, called Sapphire, appears in a short manga written by [[Suigun Oouchi]] for [[CoroCoro]] Magazine in December 2002. She is the daughter of [[Professor Birch]] and catches Pokémon for his research. Sapphire has a {{p|Torchic}} as her [[first partner Pokémon]].
